testcase.name: Should Register a new user
testcase.classname: Authentication Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Login successfully and return JWT
testcase.classname: Authentication Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should trigger Forgot Password flow and catch email in Mailpit
testcase.classname: Authentication Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Reset Password securely
testcase.classname: Authentication Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Verify Login with new password (and reject old)
testcase.classname: Authentication Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Create a Task tied to the User
testcase.classname: CRUD & Relationship Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Read the Task via the collection (filtering by relationship)
testcase.classname: CRUD & Relationship Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Update (Patch) the Task to completed
testcase.classname: CRUD & Relationship Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should reject SSE stream access without token (Security)
testcase.classname: Realtime / Durable Streams Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should accept SSE stream access with valid token
testcase.classname: Realtime / Durable Streams Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should Delete the Task securely
testcase.classname: Realtime / Durable Streams Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should hit custom endpoint successfully
testcase.classname: Custom Endpoints Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should mutate data via beforeCreate hook
testcase.classname: Lifecycle Hooks Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should allow update for regular user
testcase.classname: Access Control Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should register hacker user and deny update
testcase.classname: Access Control Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should enqueue and process a job successfully
testcase.classname: Background Workers Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should trigger cron programmatically via BullMQ
testcase.classname: Cron Scheduler Layer > E2E: Comprehensive Todo Application Lifecycle

testcase.name: Should trigger email dispatch on /forgot-password
testcase.classname: E2E: Email Flow (Forgot / Reset Password)

testcase.name: Should reset password using the token sent in the email
testcase.classname: E2E: Email Flow (Forgot / Reset Password)

testcase.name: watches for file changes and rebuilds
testcase.classname: Dev Watcher E2E

testcase.name: debounces rapid rapid file change events to avoid build race conditions
testcase.classname: Dev Watcher E2E

testcase.name: successfully builds a valid radiant project
testcase.classname: E2E CLI Tests

testcase.name: successfully builds a project with global config and env manipulators
testcase.classname: E2E CLI Tests

testcase.name: fails and exits with code 1 for syntax errors

testcase.name: fails and exits with code 1 for semantic errors
